connection.description: ws (default), webhook (httpHostToken POST), or wss (reverse WS via httpHostToken)

url.description: OneBot implementation WebSocket URL (required for connection: ws)

path.description: HTTP/WS path for webhook or reverse-wss

api_url.description: HTTP action endpoint for webhook outbound (required for connection: webhook send)

commandPrefix.description: 命令前缀（默认 '' 无前缀，任意文本按命令匹配；如 '/' 要求 / 开头）。endpoints[i] 可逐项覆盖
